case_title: HONG MY NGO VS. AGNES NGO

CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Hong My Ngo is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-22-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-22-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE TERI JACKSON; Clerk EBura/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff In Pro Per. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Oct-20-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
